message:
feat(fwc): Wire new command modules and extend batch/serve-mcp integration

Registers the seven new CLI command modules (audit_chain, install_cmd,
package_cmd, manifest_cmd, net_cmd, policy_cmd, supply_chain_cmd, trace_cmd)
into the fwc Command enum and dispatch logic.

Dependency additions:
- fcp-cbor, fcp-crypto, fcp-mesh, fcp-sandbox for core protocol operations
- hex, ipnet, semver, tracing for utility functions

Integration updates:
- batch_file.rs: Add zone override field to BatchOp for per-operation zone
  targeting in multi-zone batch workflows
- op_lock.rs: Minor adjustments for new command integration
- readiness.rs: Updated selector helpers for new command namespaces
- serve_mcp.rs: Extended MCP tool call handlers to pass host context,
  enabling zone inheritance and live connector introspection through MCP

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
